speaker: MATT
raw_text: Yes, so anyway, other things. The campaign guide, the Tal'Dorei campaign guide, info is up on the Green Ronin website. If you're looking for it, they have dates of release, price points, and where you can find it and when. So if you go to the Green Ronin website, Google search for Green Ronin, they have a section there for the front page that has all the updates, or you can look at @GreenRoninPub on twitter. They have the updates there as well. I also retweeted it on my twitter so you can find it there. But that should answer your questions. We've gotten a bunch today. Also, tomorrow and Saturday, up in Seattle, the actual folks at Dungeons & Dragons are doing the Stream of Annihilation, in which they're having a bunch of people from the community coming out there to play games together, mix it up, be crazy, and unveil their new story setting which I'm really excited for you guys to find out about. But as part of that, Marisha, Taliesin, Liam, and myself will be going up there and playing some games. I'll be running a game on Saturday morning with the Guts, Girls, Glory group. And that is going to be a lot of fun. So you should come watch. Find the information at the official Dungeons and Dragons twitter, and we'll look forward to seeing you guys over the next couple of days up there as well.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: And if you notice, he's got a few canceled appearances there at the end because--

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Because he died.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Because he's a traitorous bitch.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, and it's pretty cool, so there's that. And that's in the store right now! Go check it out.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Oh my god, right now.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Enter the Meat Man.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: If we can't have Scanlan, at least we've got the shirt.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: That's right. That's right.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: And good memories. (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Maybe, maybe we'll see Scanlan in concert sometime.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: And we'll be like, "We used to hang out with him before he was famous."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, before he was famous. Marisha, you've got a little food on your mouth. Under your lip. You got it.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Announcements continue!

speaker: MATT
raw_text: And with that, for the sake of brevity on this standpoint, you wait until they begin to gather into one space, and with a singular Fireball, Keyleth, you watch as (explosion) you send four of them screeching down, falling into the pit from the blast, while six of them appear to be heavily wounded or burned to a cinder and run off screaming, before collapsing and then smoldering maybe 20 feet from the pit. More swoop up to gather into that space, now that that explosion has drawn their attention as well. And you see a few stop for a second, smelling the ruin of their companions, and you see a moment there to shoot another Fireball as soon as they're gathered. (explosion) This one finishes off any of the stragglers there and heavily damages a handful of others. You watch now, over the period of time of you both shooting, you taking arrows and what's available, over the next five to six minutes or so, you guys cut down the numbers to about half what they were. And there's now just broken wreckage of ankhegs just torn open from the explosion, their chitinous armor fractured and open with the smoldering innards burning and sizzling from the impact of the fire. They start to slow their ascent as more and more of them begin to die, and you watch as they all begin to burrow back into the earth, scattering deeper into the ground.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, but they'll gather in the spot to get to it.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: They watch as you fly above, and you can start see them shooting these jets of acid in the arc as it begins to spray through, and you mark a little bit to stay just out of that range as you continue to do so. But the noise you are making is-- you're watching them slowly cluster up beneath where you guys are.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Okay, let me know when it looks like a good cluster.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You got a pretty good cluster, you could probably get about ten in one blast.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, let's just throw down a big ol' Fireball.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All righty.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: 20-foot radius.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: (sings) You shake my nerve--

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: (sings) -- and you rattle my brain.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: (sing) Too much love drives a man insane.

preceding_turns.speaker: ALL
preceding_turns.text: (sing) You broke my will, oh, what a thrill. Goodness gracious, great balls of fire!

speaker: MATT
raw_text: A few moments pass, and you watch as some of the ankhegs begin to pop out, like the collapsed tunnels have forced them to begin burrowing their way to the surface to orient themselves. You watch as about five, ten, 20 or so of these begin to emerge, and as they emerge they look around the space. And you watch them looking at each other and sniffing the area--

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: It's just one action.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. So you look there and focus for a second, close your eyes, and you guys watch as the edges of the sinkhole begin to shift. The single tower that was partially collapsed? Collapses into full bits of rock and rubble, and some of it spills further into the tunnel as the tunnel begins to cave in. Basically, you fill in the rest of the sinkhole, and the mine now drops 25, 30 feet as the rest of the earth comes and fills it in. Eventually, the rumbling slows and comes to a calm, and you see now there's a dip where the space in the forest was-- it's like a big bowl, and some of the trees fall into it and get buried in the earth and stone as it collapses inward.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I love that everybody was up here bickering and Pike just went "hm." (laughter)

speaker: MATT
raw_text: At this point, it's early morning. I'll say for the purposes of the hour that you got there, best that I can recall, it's like 1:30 in the morning. It's pretty late.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Do you think he has friends? He's always alone.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, I'm going to start eyeballing the room while sis goes and talks.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Is Camilla still playing music?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: The musicians are not currently playing.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: What time is it now?

speaker: MATT
raw_text: At this point, it's early morning. I'll say for the purposes of the hour that you got there, best that I can recall, it's like 1:30 in the morning. It's pretty late.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Do you think he has friends? He's always alone.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, I'm going to start eyeballing the room while sis goes and talks.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Is Camilla still playing music?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: The musicians are not currently playing.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: What time is it now?

speaker: MATT
raw_text: His head looks at you. "You did not leave but a number of hours ago. Am I to expect that you have completed this task already?"

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Do you think he has friends? He's always alone.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, I'm going to start eyeballing the room while sis goes and talks.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Is Camilla still playing music?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: The musicians are not currently playing.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: What time is it now?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: At this point, it's early morning. I'll say for the purposes of the hour that you got there, best that I can recall, it's like 1:30 in the morning. It's pretty late.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Excuse me, may we sit and talk?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "But of course. Have a seat."

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Thank you. We have done our share of the bargain, and we're here to cash in our chit, as it were.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: He motions his finger up towards one of the second rows, and you watch as one of the guards there, the ones that you've noticed before and kept your eyes on that have the hidden crossbows, knocks on the edge of a door that opens up slightly. He whispers to somebody and a few moments later another guard walks up, escorting what looks to be a young mousy woman of red-brown skin. Her eyes, as soon as you get a glance, are snow-blind. And you watch as the guard that's with her is actually holding her arm and guiding her as she walks. She has big black curls that trail down to her middle back and as she's led to the table Korshad gives a little whistle. And a drink is brought at her place and she sits down. Looks a little confused and nervous, but sits down and leans into Korshad, and he turns to her and says, "This is Duala. She will confirm your words. Duala?" She glances her face over past your group and as she does, she reaches into a pouch and brings out what looks to be a few stone runes. And she clatters them across the table. And as soon as she puts her fingers out in front and spreads them like that, the runes all magnetically (scraping) shift to match the placement of her fingers below. Her snow-blind eyes now go pure white. And there's just a moment where you watch as her head begins to drift back like a slow hinge.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Do you think he has friends? He's always alone.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, I'm going to start eyeballing the room while sis goes and talks.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Is Camilla still playing music?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: The musicians are not currently playing.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: What time is it now?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: At this point, it's early morning. I'll say for the purposes of the hour that you got there, best that I can recall, it's like 1:30 in the morning. It's pretty late.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Excuse me, may we sit and talk?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "But of course. Have a seat."

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Thank you. We have done our share of the bargain, and we're here to cash in our chit, as it were.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: His head looks at you. "You did not leave but a number of hours ago. Am I to expect that you have completed this task already?"

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, we're really, really good.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: And you should know that if you've apparently been watching us?

speaker: MATT
raw_text: At least not this form of casting. After a minute or so, her eyes come back to their snow-blind appearance, her fingers curl back in and with a very small voice she goes, "The mine is cleansed, though the mine is also collapsed." Korshad's looking at her, and goes, "But you say it is cleansed, yes. Of everything?" She gives a nod. "It is free." He looks back to you all with a very sly, begrudging brow, one eye still partially closed. "Very well. We will send men to confirm the depths of this, and operations will begin. If at any point it is discovered that this was some sort of charade or the means of our agreement were not met fully, we will be happy to make sure the rest of the Darrington estate falls back squarely under our grasp. However, for the time being and if what you say is true..." He reaches under the table and sifts through a small sack that he had held between his feet and ankles, pulls out a heavy piece of parchment. "The deed to the Darrington estate. Signed over to one Taryon Darrington."

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Do I recognize this spell?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You do not.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Okay.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: All right. So you make it to your room, left as it was. Most of the furniture is covered in sheets, but untouched as to where you left it the last time you were here. There's a firm layer of dust across most of it, and as you step into the room, with each step you can see the footfalls leaving a small trail on the floor. You have a large shelf of books that line the right wall. You can see the footsteps to and from the bookshelf where it seems like your mother has taken, here and there, little elements of your collection. You see the covered outline of your workbench, which inhabits the far side of the chamber, and a familiar smell of old oil and leathers immediately causes a flood of memories to hit you of growing up in this space. You do see, poking out from one of these sheets, some of the leftover pieces from when you constructed your first Doty, and you see the armored hand, partially open with some of the gears and runes only partially put into the hand and then discarded and left to the side, and it also reminds you of those years. You have this nostalgic wave hit you as you pull the sheet off your bed, and dust it out, and fluff your pillow, and for the first time in a long time, have a night's sleep in your own chambers.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: All right, I'll stay back down here with the pillow fort thing. Fine. But after they go to sleep, I go upstairs and go back to my bed.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay, then. Make a stealth check.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh, Jesus. Four.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Half of you open an eye in the middle of the night as you hear the creaking of the wood flooring.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Just going to the bathroom!

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: By the way, do you have any beast changing left in you?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I do, yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Could you go Minxie for me?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh, kinky.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Gross, we're all in the same room.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Yes, why?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I want a pillow.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Fine.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: That is the most Brian Blessed thing ever.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: You could've just used Trinket.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Trinket farts are an issue. Then again, so are Minxie farts.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: I want to get in a circle, like a dog, on one of the cushions.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: You turn around three times.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That's how rock gnomes sleep, they do a little circle around the cushion.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I just turn into Macklemore.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: It's very cold, but sleep does take you. You guys finish your evening's rest. You awake. After the stress of the previous battle of the day, you all tend to sleep in for the most part, plus the late hour of eventually getting to rest. You all eventually come to later in the morning, closer to noon, but as you wake up, you wake up to the smell of food being cooked. You make your way out into the central foyer area of the estate, and you can see Berthold is running around the kitchen, desperately trying to put together whatever meal is viable, and eventually shouts out, "Breakfast is served!"

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I'll cuddle with the Doty arm.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: About five minutes pass, and you hear the sound of multiple footfalls as the rest of the Darrington family makes their way down. First you have Maryanne, same attire, but she's a little more put together. You can see now she's left the robe behind to have more of her classic formal presenting-to-company outfit. Behind her you have Mariya, your mother, who is in practically the same outfit she was in yesterday. She really doesn't seem to care at this point, it's more about being comfortable.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Good morning, sister. These are my friends, Vox Machina.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Hello.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Right."

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Grog, Pike, Vex, Vax, Percy, Keyleth.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Pleasure. Brother, I wasn't aware we had company staying."

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I travel with a group now.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "I've heard. I just didn't realize..."

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I bring news, and I know it's early, but could we have a little family meeting over breakfast?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: It's super important.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: She gives you such a stink eye. "I'll go speak to Father."

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: And Mama.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "And Mama." And she heads up the stairs.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: She seems nice.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: She is not.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I like her a lot.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: "You have no right to talk to me... You stand here and shame the work that I've done, and given my life to secure and give to you and your sister, and to uphold the mistakes that my father made to the best of my ability and fix them. And you waltz in here after a year of adventuring and just expect me to accept you throwing everything I've worked for into the sewer?"

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: There's a flash of movement. Quicker than you've seen your father move, he has grabbed a chair behind him, and thrown it across the room, smashing it against the nearby wall. (heavy breathing)

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I take a step forward and unsheathe a dagger an inch and say, we're going to keep this civil today, aren't we?

speaker: MATT
raw_text: He looks about at this point. Now, his focused anger has subsided, and this emotional moment realizing that there are strangers at the table, and he (clears throat) "If you could please give us a bit of time." His hand still clustered there. He looks over to Berthold, who ushers you all out front, you staying behind, Taryon. About ten minutes or so, as you're all awkwardly waiting outside in the quiet. The cloudy day that originally brought you into Deastok is breaking in places, you see hints of blue sky peeking through, and a little bit of sunlight occasionally finding its way across the cobblestone roads of the cityscape. You hear the occasional tweet of birds as they jump from tree to tree. And in this silence you really get to take in the surrounding beauty of this town, even as oppressive and gloomy as your arrival may have been, and the tenseness of the work you had to do in this space. You allow yourself to realize that this is a nice town. You hear the door open once more from the front of the estate, and there you see Maryanne, wet on the cheeks. "My father would like to speak to you, if that's all right."

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I am, too.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: So, as you have been in the process of specifically keeping an eye out for a group of individuals, specifically looking out for the name or any mention of Vox Machina, you've spent a number of hours with no luck, frustrated. But you've made some friends in talking around, and then suddenly you hear someone shout the name from a distance. You glance over and see a cluster of individuals that match the descriptions you were given. You immediately beeline up to them. You watch as two similar-looking half-elves spin and give you the evil eye.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I take an instinctive step forward, just a half step in front of Vex.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Maybe he'll kill us and we don't have to shop anymore.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: As the figure rushes up, apparently drawn by the sound of the phrase 'Vox Machina'... (cheering)

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: No one can see you.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: We know it's there, though!

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Yeah!

preceding_turns.speaker: JON
preceding_turns.text: There's an enchantment on it. It's actually this big.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh god. Oh god! Much, much bigger than Hardwick! (laughter)

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Okay. Lionel, you watch as your boss for the past five months shifts into this tiny little man.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, you're so good at that.

preceding_turns.speaker: JON
preceding_turns.text: What are they talking about, accent?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: They are beguiled by our foreign ways and they are scared of what they do not understand.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: True.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: That's true. I'm going to start walking back to the inn, and I'm going to start pouring a lot of drinks and putting them on the table.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I do have information to share with you.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: We want to hear all of that information.

preceding_turns.speaker: JON
preceding_turns.text: You still gotta give us the designs. No?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: No.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I mean.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Why did you want the designs?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Percival's guns are really cool, and I've always wanted to have some of my own, and I used all of my ammunition over the year, and now I just have this pistol. And I produce the pistol. But it has no bullets! I don't know how to make any more bullets! I need more bullets!

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Are you a mafia don, Scanlan? Are you a bad guy?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I'll take off the hat.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Okay, so you guys sit under the Sun Tree. It's midafternoon.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: You're not the first.

preceding_turns.speaker: JON
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, that's good to know. So. But no, I didn't know much about, you know, he didn't tell me much, I didn't ask a lot of questions. Nobody's ever asked me questions. You guys are great.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Boy, that's not true. But that's good. You're a fascinating creature, sir. Good man.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: We like you. We like you, Chode. Lionel. We like you, Lionel. Hey, Lion. C'mere, c'mere.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: No.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Parchment-boulder-shears. Parchment-boulder-shears! I'm going to teach you.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: It's like rock-paper-scissors.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Okay, ready, ready, ready? Boulder, parchment, or shears. Okay. Ready? On three.

preceding_turns.speaker: JON
preceding_turns.text: One, two, three.

preceding_turns.speaker: JON
preceding_turns.text: I punch her. (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Never mind, not disappointed.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: As this transpires, we come over to you two, having a drink. So you guys find a separate pub.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I figured we just sat under the Sun Tree.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, I've got a flask.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: As you take a moment and you kneel, and you close your eyes, you envision the connection you had as a child to the ducks along the pond of the oasis, and as you open your eyes again, you see there, waddling in through the doorway of the inn, as the sun in the afternoon is going down to dusk, this one duck (quacking).

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Okay. Yeah. If anyone tries to kill me, kill them.

preceding_turns.speaker: JON
preceding_turns.text: Oh, yeah, I got it. I have danger sense.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh, you do?

preceding_turns.speaker: JON
preceding_turns.text: And the ducks will tell me if there's anything wrong.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: The ducks. Yes, I know this about you.

preceding_turns.speaker: JON
preceding_turns.text: I actually have Commune with Ducks.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: He does actually have Commune with Ducks. It is on the page. Staring at it right now.

preceding_turns.speaker: JON
preceding_turns.text: You know what, I'm going to use it right now.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Do we have ducks near us?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: There are ducks in Whitestone!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: In Whitestone, there's a lot more ducks in this area than there are in Marquet.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: There are ducks. We have ponds in the local park. There's a small pond in the cemetery.

preceding_turns.speaker: JON
preceding_turns.text: I forget I can do that wherever I go, and I never get the chance.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: What are you going to ask them?

preceding_turns.speaker: JON
preceding_turns.text: They can tell me up to three facts about the land.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Yes, what do the ducks of Whitestone say?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: What do the ducks say?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: (quacking)

speaker: MATT
raw_text: So we'll say at the next morning light, as you all come to consciousness, you find there, spry and waiting in the center of town, one Scanlan Shorthalt and one Lionel Gayheart, ready to join you on a trip back to Ank'harel. And that's where we'll pick up next week.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to leave the little rock thing that Grog gave me right outside his door, and I'll get Lionel up at first light, and I guess we'll set off for Ank'harel.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: No!

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: We'll see him there.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. That's a two-week journey for you.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I got no other way to get there.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: You could come with us.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: It was not offered.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yes, you were, we didn't tell you to go! Scanlan, we said don't go!

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Didn't you just say I will see you there?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: No! Fucking Keyleth said that!

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I said if you run away we'll still find you.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: We'll still be right behind you.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: We're not telling you to fucking go.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Wait, so you want to travel with me?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yes!

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh, okay, well, then I'll stick around.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: All over the earring.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: You know, I miss this drama. This is the drama I missed. This is great.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: It's kind of amazing. But anyway, guys, we're going to go because some of us have flights in the morning to go the Stream of Annihilation tomorrow and Saturday at D&D. Big round of applause for Jon Heder. (cheering)

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: That was so much fun.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: That was amazing!

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Lionel!

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Prepare for so much duck art. There's just going to be... It's going to be like a 50's study. It's going to be so much.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Ducks everywhere.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: I love it.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Mallard art.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh my God, next week's our 100th episode! How fucking weird is it that we got the T-shirts released...

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Oh, dude. The minute that you showed that the T-shirts had shown up to everyone in the store tonight, me and Sam were like...

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Like, if people didn't think we had a writer's room before, they definitely are now! This feels like a marketing campaign!

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I didn't know about the shirts until we showed up. That's just been in process.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, we've just been working on this shirt for a while. And it came out this week.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: We didn't plan that in any way.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Serendipitous.
